> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add netlify/context-and-tools --skill netlify-deploy --skill netlify-functions --skill netlify-edge-functions -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/netlify-edge-functions`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/netlify-edge-functions.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add netlify/context-and-tools --skill netlify-deploy --skill netlify-functions --skill netlify-edge-functions -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Guide for writing Netlify Edge Functions. Use when building middleware, geolocation-based logic, request/response manipulation, authentication checks, A/B testing, or low-latency edge compute. Covers Deno runtime, context.next() middleware, geolocation (city/country etc via context.geo), config paths/methods, when to choose edge vs serverless. Limits: 50ms CPU, 512MB, 20MB code.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add netlify/context-and-tools --skill netlify-deploy --skill netlify-functions --skill netlify-edge-functions -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[netlify/context-and-tools](https://github.com/netlify/context-and-tools) (official, MIT)

## Comparable Alternatives

Cloudflare Workers / Deno Deploy skills; general edge compute patterns in framework skills (Next.js middleware etc).

&gt; Web-augmented 2026 from repo SKILL.md + README. Evidence only.
